weapons.name: Harpoon (AGM-84)
weapons.description: All-weather, over-the-horizon anti-ship missile. Sea-skimming terminal phase. Active radar homing. Primary US Navy anti-ship weapon.

weapons.name: SM-2 (RIM-66)
weapons.description: Standard Missile 2. Medium-range surface-to-air missile. Semi-active radar homing with inertial midcourse. Aegis fire control.

weapons.name: Mk 46 Torpedo
weapons.description: Lightweight anti-submarine torpedo. Acoustic homing with active/passive modes. Launched from surface ships and helicopters.

weapons.name: ASROC (RUR-5)
weapons.description: Anti-Submarine Rocket. Rocket-boosted Mk 46 torpedo delivery. Extends ASW engagement range beyond hull sonar range.

weapons.name: Type 65 Torpedo
weapons.description: Soviet heavyweight torpedo. 650mm diameter. Wake-homing guidance. Massive warhead capable of mission-killing any surface ship. Long range.

weapons.name: Mk 48 ADCAP
weapons.description: Heavyweight wire-guided torpedo. Primary US submarine weapon. Active/passive acoustic homing with wire guidance for mid-course corrections.

weapons.name: P-700 Granit (SS-N-19)
weapons.description: Supersonic anti-ship cruise missile. Mach 2.5 with 750kg warhead. Primary armament of Kirov-class. Inertial midcourse with active radar terminal homing. Extreme speed makes CIWS intercept nearly impossible.

weapons.name: RPK-6 Vodopad (SS-N-16)
weapons.description: Anti-submarine missile delivering a torpedo to the target area. Soviet equivalent of ASROC but with significantly greater range.

weapons.name: SET-65 Torpedo
weapons.description: Soviet 533mm anti-submarine torpedo. Acoustic homing. Standard torpedo on Udaloy-class destroyers.
